name: generate_barcode
description: Generate a barcode image of the specified type encoding the given data. Saves the image file to the mounted data directory and returns the file path.

arguments.name: barcode_type
arguments.desc: Barcode symbology (e.g. QR or Code128 or DataMatrix or EAN13 or PDF417 etc.). Use list_barcode_types for all existing values. Only one value should be passed.

arguments.name: data
arguments.desc: Data to encode in the barcode

arguments.name: image_format
arguments.desc: Output format: PNG (default) or JPEG or SVG or GIF or TIFF.

arguments.name: text_location
arguments.desc: Text position: Below or Above or None. Default depends on barcode type

name: recognize_barcode
description: Recognize barcodes of a specific type from an image file in the mounted data directory. Allows specifying barcode type and recognition quality. Use barcode_type=QR for QR-only.

arguments.name: image_path
arguments.desc: Path to image file in the mounted data directory (PNG, JPEG, GIF, TIFF, or BMP)

arguments.name: barcode_type
arguments.desc: Types to look for, comma-separated (e.g. QR or Code128 or QR,Code128). Use list_barcode_types for all existing values. Default: most commonly used types.

arguments.name: recognition_mode
arguments.desc: Quality vs speed: Fast or Normal (default) or Excellent

name: scan_barcode
description: Automatically detect and read most common barcodes from an image file in the mounted data directory without specifying barcode type.

arguments.name: image_path
arguments.desc: Path to image file in the mounted data directory (PNG, JPEG, GIF, TIFF, or BMP)

name: list_barcode_types
description: List all supported barcode types for generation and recognition.
